title: viola × duffortii
intro: Viola × duffortii, also known as the Duffort's violet or hybrid viola, is a rare and exotic hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Viola x hybrida and Viola latifolia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to provide various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. Viola × duffortii can be used to make herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
